codeReview.summary: Implementation fully satisfies VAL-LIB-001 and VAL-LIB-002. Created Effect-based storage and cookie services with comprehensive Either-based error handling. All 32 new tests pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker added library documentation files (.factory/library/*.md) that weren't mentioned in AGENTS.md. This is valuable knowledge capture but was not part of the original task scope.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit shows .factory/library/architecture.md, environment.md, user-testing.md were added

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature specified skillName 'worker' but no worker skill exists in .factory/skills/. The worker proceeded without this skill guidance, which may have led to additional exploration time.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json shows skillName: 'worker' but ls .factory/skills/ shows only ralph-tui-* skills

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker discovered and documented Effect.ts version requirements and testing setup in library files, which were not previously captured.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/environment.md documents Effect.ts v3.20.0, @effect/platform v0.95.0, testing setup

summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. Storage service (storage.ts) provides getItem, setItem, removeItem, getJsonItem, setJsonItem, clear, getKeys, hasKey functions returning Either for error handling. Cookie service (cookies.ts) provides getCookie, setCookie, removeCookie, getJsonCookie, setJsonCookie, hasCookie, getAllCookies with similar Either-based error handling. Both handle SSR environments gracefully. All 173 tests pass (32 new storage tests). Code follows TypeScript conventions from CLAUDE.md (4 spaces, single quotes). The worker also added library documentation capturing Effect.ts patterns and environment info that wasn't previously documented.
